error.signature: upload-artifact fails — path with spaces not properly quoted in GitHub Actions

verdict.summary: GitHub Actions upload-artifact or cache action fails when path contains spaces or special characters.

dead_ends.action: Escape spaces with backslash in YAML
dead_ends.why_fails: YAML backslash escaping is inconsistent; most actions parse paths as plain strings

dead_ends.action: Use shell globbing to match files with spaces
dead_ends.why_fails: Glob patterns in actions/upload-artifact do not handle spaces in directory names

workarounds.action: Quote the path and use GitHub Actions expression syntax for dynamic paths
workarounds.how: path: "build output/artifacts"  # YAML quoted string preserves spaces

workarounds.action: Rename output directories to avoid spaces in CI workflow
workarounds.how: run: mv 'build output' build-output  # normalize paths before artifact upload
